Home / Services / Asphalt Driveway Paving

Asphalt Driveway Paving

Durable, cost-effective asphalt driveways built to last in Dallas.

Asphalt driveways offer a cost-effective and durable solution for Dallas homeowners. HMC Asphalt and Concrete Inc. specializes in asphalt driveway paving, providing smooth, long-lasting surfaces designed to withstand the Texas heat and occasional ice storms. Our process begins with a thorough site assessment, taking into account drainage, soil conditions, and existing structures. We then prepare the base with compacted gravel to ensure proper support and prevent cracking.

We use a high-quality asphalt mix specifically formulated for residential driveways, ensuring optimal flexibility and resistance to wear and tear. Our experienced crew expertly lays and compacts the asphalt, creating a seamless, even surface. We also offer sealcoating services to protect your asphalt driveway from UV damage, oil spills, and other environmental factors, extending its lifespan and maintaining its appearance.

Whether you're looking to replace an old, cracked driveway or install a new one, HMC Asphalt and Concrete delivers superior asphalt paving services that enhance your property's curb appeal and value. We handle everything from excavation to final cleanup, ensuring a hassle-free experience for our clients.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site Assessment and Preparation
  2. 02 Step 2: Base Layer Installation (Compacted Gravel)
  3. 03 Step 3: Asphalt Paving and Compaction
  4. 04 Step 4: Sealcoating (Optional)

Benefits

  • Cost-Effective Solution
  • Durable and Long-Lasting
  • Smooth, Even Surface
  • Increased Curb Appeal

Frequently Asked Questions

How long will an asphalt driveway last in Dallas?

With proper installation and maintenance, an asphalt driveway can last 15-20 years in the Dallas climate. Sealcoating every 2-3 years helps protect against UV damage and extends its lifespan.

What is the cost of asphalt driveway paving?

The cost varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We provide free, no-obligation quotes to give you an accurate estimate.

How soon can I drive on my new asphalt driveway?

We recommend waiting at least 24-48 hours before driving on your new asphalt driveway to allow it to fully cure and harden.
